title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures today, and experienced a significant increase in the afternoon.The main contract I2409 closed at 870, with a daily increase of 4.25%. Traders are actively selling, while steel mills are cautious and have reduced their inquiries. Overall, the market has a good trading atmosphere today.
